Title: Sarah Johnson
Content: Sarah is a certified yoga instructor with over 10 years of experience. She specializes in Vinyasa and Hatha yoga, helping students build flexibility, strength, and mindfulness through thoughtful practice.
Excerpt: Certified yoga instructor specializing in Vinyasa and Hatha yoga.

Title: Mike Thompson
Content: Mike is a CrossFit Level 2 trainer and former competitive athlete. He brings high energy and structured programming to every session, focusing on functional fitness and performance improvement.
Excerpt: CrossFit Level 2 trainer focused on functional fitness.

Title: Lisa Chen
Content: Lisa is a nationally certified Pilates instructor and dance professional. She combines classical Pilates techniques with modern movement science to deliver classes that improve core strength and posture.
Excerpt: Certified Pilates instructor and dance professional.

Title: James Rodriguez
Content: James is a professional boxing coach with 15 years of ring experience. He offers cardio boxing classes for all fitness levels, combining boxing technique with high-intensity interval training.
Excerpt: Professional boxing coach with 15 years of experience.
